name: Hou Set Expression
description: Set a parameter expression on a Houdini node. Supports HScript and Python expression languages.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    node_path = inputs.get('node_path') or self.get_parameter('node_path', '')
    parm_name = inputs.get('parm_name') or self.get_parameter('parm_name', '')
    expression = inputs.get('expression') or self.get_parameter('expression', '')
    language = inputs.get('language') or self.get_parameter('language', 'hscript')

    if not node_path or not parm_name or not expression:
        self.log_error('Node path, parameter name, and expression are required')
        await self.set_output('success', False)
        await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
        return {'success': False}

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        bridge.set_expression(node_path, parm_name, expression, language)
        self.log_info(f'Set expression on {node_path}/{parm_name}: {expression} ({language})')
        await self.set_output('success', True)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to set expression: {e}')
        await self.set_output('success', False)

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'success': self.get_parameter('success', False)}
